name: smart-leads-dashboard
description: Full-stack MERN lead management dashboard with TypeScript, authentication, RBAC, filtering, pagination, CSV export, and Docker.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace server && npm run lint --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
